text:
V0200A01B_DLRM_CPL_CD V0200A01B Delirium Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Delirium care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
566 V0200A02A_DMNT_CTR_CD V0200A02A_DMNT_CTR_CD V0200A02A Dementia Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Cognitive Loss/Dementia CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
567
